"; $replacement = "http://yahoo.com/abc1"; $modified = str_replace("http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1", $replacement, $original); echo $modified; ?> This code replaces the URL `http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1` with `http://yahoo.com/abc1` in the given string. It works for repeating strings as well. A palindrome in the response could be: `abba`
